title: Principal Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Principal Plant Manager at Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is actively seeking a talented and motivated Plant Manager to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies:
Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pidilite Industries Digital Technologies!
